suite.name: Testautomationpractice

kw.name: Load Environment Variables
Load Environment Variables As Suite Variables
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'Load Environment Variables As Suite Variables' found. Did you try using keyword 'env.Load Environment Variables' and forgot to use enough whitespace between keyword and arguments?
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Load Environment Variables As Suite Variables' found. Did you try using keyword 'env.Load Environment Variables' and forgot to use enough whitespace between keyword and arguments?

kw.doc: Read all keys from the Environments sheet in TestData.xlsx for the active ENV and expose them as Suite Variables. Call this in Suite Setup of every test suite.
kw.status: No keyword with name 'Load Environment Variables As Suite Variables' found. Did you try using keyword 'env.Load Environment Variables' and forgot to use enough whitespace between keyword and arguments?

test.name: My First Test
test.doc: Basic smoke test — logs a message.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: No keyword with name 'Load Environment Variables As Suite Variables' found. Did you try using keyword 'env.Load Environment Variables' and forgot to use enough whitespace between keyword and arguments?

test.name: Create A Random String
test.doc: Generate and log a random 10-character string.
test.status: Parent suite setup failed: No keyword with name 'Load Environment Variables As Suite Variables' found. Did you try using keyword 'env.Load Environment Variables' and forgot to use enough whitespace between keyword and arguments?

suite.doc: Practice test automation — LOGIN_URL and BROWSER are loaded from data/TestData.xlsx via env.resource.
suite.status: Suite setup failed: No keyword with name 'Load Environment Variables As Suite Variables' found. Did you try using keyword 'env.Load Environment Variables' and forgot to use enough whitespace between keyword and arguments?
